item: Log every admin login attempt (success/failure, reason, email, IP, user-agent, geo hint, request ID).
Track failed login counters per admin, per IP, and per IP range.
Alert on brute-force patterns (N failed attempts in rolling window).
Alert on successful login after suspicious failure streak.
Alert on impossible travel (short-time geolocation jump).
Alert on first-seen device/browser fingerprint for each admin.
Alert on first login from new ASN/network.
Track refresh-token usage anomalies (rapid refresh churn, reused invalid refresh).
Alert when expired-access refresh flow repeatedly fails for same admin.
Build login heatmap (hour/day patterns) for anomaly baseline.
Track active session count per admin and global active admin sessions.
Alert on unusually high concurrent sessions for one admin.
Log every session revocation event and trigger source (self/system/security).
Detect and alert on token replay indicators.
Monitor session TTL distribution and long-lived session outliers.
Alert on session creation spikes across all admins.
Track device-to-session mapping and unusual device churn.
Log every permission template change (before/after diff, actor, timestamp).
Log every role-permission rollout with matched/modified counts and actor.
Alert on high-risk permission grants (write/delete/refund/admin-management actions).
Alert when permission templates change outside approved windows.
Detect drift between expected permission template and actual assigned permissions.
Log denied admin requests with missing permission key and endpoint.
Dashboard for top denied permission keys and affected admins.
Centralize immutable audit logs for all admin API mutations.
Capture actor, target entity, action type, endpoint, payload hash, and response status.
Include correlation/request IDs to reconstruct multi-step actions.
Track sensitive operations separately (account deletion, onboarding decisions, payouts/refunds).
Alert on burst deletes/updates by one admin in short intervals.
Alert when one admin touches unusually many unique entities quickly.
Add tamper-evidence controls (append-only storage or hash chaining).
Log admin account create/deactivate/delete events with actor-target linkage.
Alert when admin accounts are deleted/deactivated outside policy windows.
Alert on frequent account-status flips (ACTIVE/INACTIVE/SUSPENDED churn).
Monitor orphaned tokens after account deactivation/deletion.
Add daily report of account lifecycle events and pending actions.
Track approve/reject rates per admin and globally.
Alert on outlier rejection rates by an individual admin.
Alert when rejection reasons are missing for reject actions.
Monitor review latency from submission to admin decision.
Dashboard for onboarding pipeline health and admin reviewer throughput.
Endpoint-level latency/error dashboards for `/v1/admins/*`.
Alert on sustained 5xx for admin auth and permission endpoints.
Alert on spikes in 401/403 for admin endpoints (possible attack or rollout issue).
Monitor rate-limit hits by admin endpoint and source IP.
Detect schema validation failure spikes (422 bursts) per endpoint.
Track high-impact data mutations initiated by admins (who/what/when).
Alert on conflicting updates to same record in short window.
Periodic checks for permission-template integrity and required fields.
Monitor token-store consistency (access-refresh linkage integrity).
Add reconciliation job metrics (processed/failed/retried lifecycle jobs).
Define severity tiers: info, warning, high, critical.
Route alerts by type (security to security channel, ops to ops channel).
Deduplicate and suppress noisy duplicates with cooldown windows.
Add alert ownership/acknowledgement workflow.
Track MTTA/MTTR for admin-related security incidents.
Add runbook links per alert type.
Admin security overview dashboard (login risk, session anomalies, permission changes).
Operational dashboard for admin endpoint reliability (latency/error/rate-limit).
Daily audit digest (top risky actions, anomalies, failed auth trends).
Weekly compliance digest (permission changes, sensitive actions, account lifecycle events).
Per-admin activity profile dashboard for investigations.
Define retention policy for admin audit logs (hot/warm/archive).
Add PII-aware logging policy (redaction of sensitive fields).
Ensure audit logs are queryable by actor, target, endpoint, and date range.
Add export capability for incident/compliance investigations.
Enforce timezone-normalized timestamps (UTC) across all audit streams.
Standardize structured log schema for all admin flows.
Add event bus/topic for security/audit events (non-blocking emit).
Add monitoring IDs (`eventId`, `requestId`, `actorId`, `targetId`) consistently.
Add feature flags for progressive rollout of monitoring alerts.
Create test fixtures for anomaly scenarios (brute force, token replay, permission abuse).
Add synthetic monitoring checks for critical admin endpoints.
Use RS256-signed JWTs only.
Strict token validation on every protected endpoint:
`iss` exact match
`aud` exact match
`exp`, `iat`, `nbf`
required `sub`
acceptable `azp` / `client_id` set (where applicable)
Enforce least-privilege scopes and deny-by-default.
Keep authorization decisions in backend services, not only in token claims.
Enable Auth0 refresh token rotation + reuse detection.
Enable MFA for admin users (and optionally risky customer/cleaner flows).
Enable brute-force and suspicious IP protections in Auth0 tenant.
Keep app-side monitoring for anomaly/audit independent from Auth0.
Create isolated Auth0 tenants: `dev`, `staging`, `prod`.
Configure custom domain for production.
Configure API audience per environment.
Configure social connection(s): Google first.
Configure callback/logout URLs with exact allowlists.
Configure signing keys and rotation policy.
Configure attack protection:
brute-force protection
breached password detection
suspicious IP throttling
Configure MFA policy:
mandatory for admins
adaptive policy for other roles
Define and store secrets in secret manager (not `.env` in prod).
Successful login and token issuance in all environments.
Admin MFA challenge required in configured flows.
Integrate Auth0 FastAPI verification dependency.
Build `AuthPrincipal` from validated claims (`sub`, `email`, provider info, scopes).
Remove acceptance of internal/legacy JWTs from protected APIs.
Add centralized auth error mapping into existing response envelope.
Implement JWKS caching with secure fallback behavior:
cache TTL
background refresh on key miss
fail-closed on invalid signatures
Protected endpoints reject non-Auth0 tokens.
Signature/key rollover handled without downtime.
Persist Auth0 identity references in local user records:
`auth_provider`
`auth_subject` (Auth0 `sub`)
`email_verified`
`last_auth_at`
Implement idempotent upsert by `auth_subject`.
Add strict email-link rules to prevent account takeover:
do not auto-merge unverified email identities
require verified email + policy checks for linking
Define first-login role bootstrap defaults and manual escalation path.
First login provisions account safely.
Repeat logins resolve same account deterministically.
No duplicate or cross-linked accounts.
Map Auth0-authenticated principals into current role/permission system.
Keep permission template checks and account-status checks unchanged in behavior.
Optionally consume token scopes as additional constraints, not sole authorization source.
Log every permission deny with principal + endpoint + permission key.
Authorization parity for all role-protected endpoints.
No privilege escalation from token claims alone.
Use Auth0 access tokens for API calls.
Use Auth0 refresh tokens where needed with rotation enabled.
Do not issue internal access/refresh tokens.
Implement logout/session revocation strategy:
app logout
global logout / revoke all sessions
compromised-account response path
Define max session lifetime + idle timeout policy per role.
Refresh reuse events are detectable and actionable.
Session revocation works for incident response.
Emit auth events for:
login success/failure
provider used
token verification failures
account linking events
unusual geo/device/network patterns
Route high-severity alerts to webhook/email/internal inbox.
Add dashboards split by role/provider/environment.
Add runbooks:
Auth0 outage mode
social provider outage
key rotation failure
suspicious token activity surge
MTTA/MTTR targets tracked for auth incidents.
On-call can triage from alert to root cause with runbooks.
Redact PII in logs (tokens, secrets, sensitive identity payloads).
Enforce UTC timestamps across auth/audit streams.
Retention policy for auth and audit events (hot/warm/archive).
Export capability for compliance/incident investigations.
Access controls for who can query auth/audit exports.
Audit queries support actor/target/endpoint/date filtering.
Retention and redaction policies verified in staging.
Security review complete (threat model + checklist sign-off).
Pen-test or focused auth abuse testing completed.
Load testing for auth-protected high-traffic endpoints.
Failover drills (JWKS issue, Auth0 unavailability, callback misconfig).
Feature flags and kill-switch validated.
No critical/high unresolved auth risks.
All blocking test suites pass.
Incident playbooks validated by dry-run.
Unit tests:
claim parsing and validation failures
principal mapping and role bootstrap
account-linking guardrails
Integration tests:
protected endpoints with valid Auth0 JWT
invalid issuer/audience/signature/expiry cases
disabled/inactive local account with valid token
Security tests:
replay and refresh misuse scenarios
privilege escalation attempts via manipulated claims
rate-limit + lockout behavior
E2E tests:
Google social sign-in full path
admin MFA flow
logout and session revoke flow
Auth0 is the only auth token issuer/validator path in production.
Backend authorization/business policy remains authoritative and verified.
Security controls (MFA, rotation, strict validation, monitoring, runbooks) are operational.
No legacy auth/token code path remains enabled.
